title: Decision Trees, Live
tagline: Watch a CART tree split a 2-D plane axis-aligned, slice by slice — and see exactly when it overfits
summary: Click points to add training data; the tree grows live, splitting by Gini / entropy / variance reduction. Sliders for max depth and minimum-samples-per-leaf. Compare the tree's decision boundary to logistic regression and a random forest of 25 trees side-by-side.
highlights: Click left/right to add class-A / class-B points; tree re-grows live each click.
Split criterion selector (Gini / entropy) and depth + min-samples sliders.
Side-by-side: 1 tree vs random forest of 25 trees vs logistic regression.
Tree-shape diagram with split points labelled; feature-importance bars.
